operator_summary: PropertyQuarry source/browser flagship proof is materialized, but the current browser-proof or release-doc state still blocks the claim; this does not establish global launch authority, and final live readiness is not evaluated by this receipt.

release_claim.summary: The standalone PropertyQuarry surface can only claim flagship-grade release truth when its browser workflow proof and release asset verification agree with this gate seed.
required_conditions: EA product surface canon exists and names the public navigation, app navigation, first-value journey, surface system, copy rules, and LTD delivery map
source-backed browser proof renders the standalone PropertyQuarry search, shortlist, research, and failed-run surfaces
real browser E2E opens ranked PropertyQuarry results and candidate research packets on desktop
real browser E2E proves the standalone PropertyQuarry decision workbench remains usable on mobile
a versioned market envelope proves every claimed country, locale, currency, timezone, provider set, listing mode, privacy region, and support window end to end
candidate-bound Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit evidence plus manual assistive-technology review supports WCAG 2.2 Level AA
candidate and protected live evidence meet the governed performance, privacy, security, reliability, capacity, observability, backup, rollback, incident, and support controls
Core Gold remains launchable without optional paid advanced visuals, whose claims require a separate additive live binding
the exact committed SHA and immutable image pass protected launch Gold from raw live evidence
release asset verification knows the EA flagship truth plane, the EA product surface canon, and the gate seed
release checklists cite the EA truth plane and the EA product surface canon instead of using MILESTONE green as the oracle

rows.label: Public entry and optional media recovery
Onboarding, authentication, session return, and sign-out
Search setup, ranked results, and failed-run recovery
Shortlist, research detail, persistence, and revisit
Account, pricing, privacy lifecycle, and recovery
Decision packets, sharing, tours, and recovery
Alert controls, channel preferences, and external Telegram delivery
